Imports

versions, runner

Types

CompilerLanguage = enum
  Nim, NimSkull, NLVM = "nlvm"
Source   Edit   
CompilerVersion = object
  language*: CompilerLanguage
  version*: Version
  extra*: string
  os*: string
  cpu*: string
  date*: string
  git*: string
  boot_switches*: seq[string]
Source   Edit  

Lets

compilerPeg =
  proc fn_init`gensym250(): MatchState[char] {.gensym.}
  proc fn_run`gensym250(ms_NP: var MatchState; s_NP: openArray[char];
                        nv: var CompilerVersion): MatchResult {.gensym.}
  Parser[char, CompilerVersion](fn_init: fn_init`gensym250,
                                fn_run: fn_run`gensym250)
Source   Edit  

Procs

proc parseCompilerVersion(s: string): Option[CompilerVersion] {.
    ...raises: [Exception], tags: [RootEffect], forbids: [].}
Source   Edit   
proc runCompilerVersion(exe: string = ""): Option[CompilerVersion] {.
    ...raises: [OSError, ValueError, Exception, IOError], tags: [ReadDirEffect,
    ReadEnvEffect, ReadIOEffect, RootEffect, WriteEnvEffect, ExecIOEffect],
    forbids: [].}
recover the compiler version from the given executable Source   Edit
